title: Lack of new stimulus measures triggers selloff
section_path: Lack of new stimulus measures triggers selloff
section_path_text: Lack of new stimulus measures triggers selloff
summary:
Main
Metal and energy markets came under pressure after China failed to deliver fresh stimulus measures. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-10-09 114645.png | assets/2024-10-09_lack-of-new-stimulus-measures-triggers-selloff_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_e13acd17aeb6.png

Market Commentary
Iron ore and base metal futures slumped after Beijing failed to deliver any meaningful stimulus measures to help boost economic growth. A scheduled press briefing by officials from the National Development and Reform Commission was expected to provide details of the fiscal stimulus measure the country's Politburo called for prior to the Golden Week holiday.
